must_do.full_text:
🚨JAPANESE AI STARTUP JUST MATCHED CLAUDE FABLE 5 AND MYTHOS PERFORMANCE.

Japanese AI lab just launched Fugu, a model trained to command other models.

Sakana AI, a Tokyo-based AI startup, was co-founded by researchers including one of the authors of the original Transformer https://t.co/wwgWLvuVnD
must_do.summary: 日本AI初创Sakana AI推出Fugu模型，性能匹配Claude Fable 5，由Transformer论文作者之一创办。
angles: Transformer之父新作：Sakana Fugu匹敌Claude Fable 5
日本AI黑马突起：东京初创挑战OpenAI
模型指挥官Fugu：AI时代的新范式

must_do.full_text:
This is genuinely wild. 🤯

A Japanese AI lab just built a model that matches Claude Fable 5 performance.

It's called Sakana Fugu, and it was built in Tokyo by a co-author of the original Transformer paper.

The guy who helped invent the architecture every AI runs on just built
must_do.summary: 日本AI实验室Sakana AI推出Fugu模型，性能媲美Claude Fable 5，由Transformer论文共同作者创办。
angles: Transformer之父打造Fugu：日本AI的逆袭

must_do.full_text:

Japan is now officially in the AI race

must_do.summary: 日本发布AI模型性能与Claude Mythos相当，正式加入AI竞争。这是日本在大模型领域的重要突破，打破了美国垄断格局。

must_do.full_text:
‼️BREAKING: a tiny lab in Tokyo just built a model that matches the performance of Fable and Mythos.

the numbers are real too - 54.2 on SWE-Pro, 95.1 on GPQA-D, 93.2 on LiveCodeBench v6. it edges out Opus, Gemini 3.1, and GPT 5.4 on each one and because it’s just coordinating https://t.co/6Fib29aQ6p
must_do.summary: 东京小型实验室推出模型性能匹配Fable/Mythos，在SWE-Pro、GPQA-D等多项基准测试中超越Opus/Gemini/GPT。

must_do.full_text: My family is donating another $400,000 to the Zig Software Foundation. Zig is exceptional software. I use AI every day. Zig has one of the strongest anti-AI policies in open source. We disagree on some things, but respect doesn’t require agreement. https://t.co/gaOuwjDDtm

priority.full_text:
George R.R. Martin tracked 8 viewpoint characters in the first book. By the fifth he was tracking 31. The reason book six never ships is hiding in that jump.

Every POV is a piece of state that has to stay consistent: where the character is, what they know, what day it is, who
priority.summary: 乔治·R·R·马丁《冰与火之歌》第一部8个POV角色，第五部增至31个。复杂度爆炸导致第六部难产。创意管理的极限案例。
angles: 为什么《冰火》第六部永远写不完？复杂度爆炸的真相
31个POV角色的噩梦：创意管理的极限在哪
从8到31：一个作家如何被自己的故事淹没

priority.full_text:
People here discussing what happened with OpenClaw.

The hype died down. We improved quality and grew a team. We created a non-profit whereas competiors are VC funded and have other agendas.

This is our strongest week so far.

backup.full_text:
nothing will hold back ambitious teens more than thinking there is some hidden knowledge in books or other peoples thoughts

NEVER get stuck thinking your success depends on anything but your actions. fuck books fuck podcasts, just do things and think hard about it
backup.summary: 创业建议：不要被书籍和播客的知识迷惑，成功取决于行动和思考。个人观点分享，缺乏具体案例。
angles: 为什么书籍和播客都是浪费时间：行动才是王道
